_comment: Edit this file to customize the companion app — no coding needed

refresh.label: ↺ Refresh from G2 Simulator
refresh.description: Reads the latest study data from the glasses simulator (same browser localStorage)

how_to_open.title: How to open the companion app
how_to_open._instructions: Paste a YouTube URL or local video path here, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
